skill.name: testing-qa
skill.description: Comprehensive testing and QA workflow covering unit testing, integration testing, E2E testing, browser automation, and quality assurance.
skill.summary: Comprehensive testing and QA workflow covering unit testing, integration testing, E2E testing, browser automation, and quality gates.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: This skill is a documentation-only markdown file describing a testing and QA workflow bundle. The static analyzer flagged backtick syntax in markdown as potential shell commands, but this is a false positive. The file contains no executable code, no network requests, and no system access. All 67 detected patterns are false positives from markdown documentation.

high_findings.title: False Positive: External Command Detection
high_findings.description: Static analyzer flagged backtick syntax in markdown as shell commands. The skill is a documentation file with skill references and prompt templates using markdown backticks, not executable code.
high_findings.confidence_reasoning: This is a markdown documentation file with no executable code. Backticks are used for code formatting and skill references like @test-automator.

high_findings.title: False Positive: Cryptographic Algorithm Detection
high_findings.description: Static analyzer detected 'weak cryptographic algorithms' at various lines. The file contains no cryptographic code - these are false positives from pattern matching.
high_findings.confidence_reasoning: No cryptographic algorithms exist in this file. The skill is pure documentation about testing workflows.

high_findings.title: False Positive: Screen Capture Detection
high_findings.description: Static analyzer flagged '@screenshots' reference as 'screen capture upload'. This is a legitimate testing skill reference for visual regression testing.
high_findings.confidence_reasoning: The @screenshots skill is used for automated visual testing, a standard QA practice, not malicious screen capture.

content.user_title: Set Up Comprehensive Testing QA Workflow
content.value_statement: This skill provides a structured testing and QA workflow covering unit tests, integration tests, E2E testing, browser automation, and quality gates for production-ready software.
actual_capabilities: Design comprehensive testing strategies across multiple testing phases
Guide implementation of unit, integration, and E2E tests
Provide skill recommendations for different testing needs
Set up browser automation and visual regression testing
Define quality gates and code review processes
Configure performance testing and load testing workflows
limitations: This skill is a documentation bundle, not an executable tool
Does not directly run tests - provides guidance only
Requires other skills to execute specific testing tasks
Does not include test frameworks or libraries

use_cases.title: Set Up Testing Infrastructure
use_cases.description: Use this workflow to establish a comprehensive testing strategy for a new project, including unit tests, integration tests, and E2E tests.

use_cases.title: Automate Browser Testing
use_cases.description: Implement browser automation and visual regression testing for web applications using Playwright and screenshot tools.

use_cases.title: Establish Quality Gates
use_cases.description: Define quality gates with linting, code review, security scanning, and verification steps before production deployment.

prompt_templates.title: Design Testing Strategy
prompt_templates.prompt: Use @testing-qa to design a comprehensive testing strategy for my project. I need to cover unit tests, integration tests, and E2E tests.
prompt_templates.scenario: When starting a new project and need to establish testing infrastructure

prompt_templates.title: Implement Unit Tests
prompt_templates.prompt: Use @testing-qa to help me write unit tests. I want to cover JavaScript with Jest and Python with pytest.
prompt_templates.scenario: When writing unit tests for application code

prompt_templates.title: Create E2E Tests
prompt_templates.prompt: Use @testing-qa to create end-to-end tests using Playwright. I need to test critical user paths.

prompt_templates.title: Set Up Quality Gates
prompt_templates.prompt: Use @testing-qa to define quality gates for my project. Include linting, code review, security scanning, and test coverage requirements.

output: Here is a comprehensive testing strategy for your project:
I recommend using Playwright for E2E testing. Here is a workflow:
3. Write test scripts for critical paths

best_practices: Follow the testing pyramid: prioritize unit tests (70%) over integration (20%) and E2E (10%)
Use quality gates to enforce test coverage thresholds before deployment
Automate visual regression testing to catch UI changes automatically
anti_patterns: Skipping unit tests in favor of only E2E tests (slow and brittle)
Setting unrealistic test coverage targets without considering test maintenance
Ignoring security scanning in the quality gates

faq.question: What is the testing pyramid?
faq.answer: The testing pyramid is a concept that guides test distribution: 70% unit tests (fast, focused), 20% integration tests (service interactions), and 10% E2E tests (critical user paths).

faq.question: Does this skill run tests?
faq.answer: No, this is a workflow documentation skill that provides guidance and references to other skills that can execute tests.

faq.question: What testing frameworks are supported?
faq.answer: The workflow references JavaScript (Jest/Vitest), Python (pytest), Playwright for E2E, and various other testing tools.

faq.question: How do I integrate with CI/CD?
faq.answer: Use the quality gates phase to configure linting, test execution, security scanning, and verification steps in your CI pipeline.

faq.question: What are quality gates?
faq.answer: Quality gates are checkpoints that must pass before code proceeds, including test coverage, linting, security scans, and code review approval.

faq.question: Can I use this for performance testing?
faq.answer: Yes, Phase 6 covers performance testing with references to performance engineering and profiling skills.
